evals.prompt: I added a new API endpoint. Generate documentation for my recent changes.
evals.expected_output: Documentation generated for new endpoint - JSDoc/TSDoc or equivalent. README or API docs updated. Follows project conventions.

evals.prompt: /docs src/api/ - document the API changes we made
evals.expected_output: API documentation for src/api/ changes. Endpoints, parameters, responses documented. Migration guide if breaking changes.
